src/main/java/com/students/studentProfil.general_idea: Exclude Spring Data Web auto-configuration to resolve conflicts or unwanted behavior in the newer Spring Boot version.
src/main/java/com/students/studentProfil.why_exists: Without this exclusion, the application may fail to start or behave incorrectly due to incompatible or conflicting auto-configuration classes in the target Spring Boot version (J21 context).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode and APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific code is introduced.
